issues.title: When using the Deepseek model and MCP client for a conversation, the request is suspended for a long time, and it is suspected that it continues to retry and returns empty data
issues.body:
**Bug desc**
Using Deepseek model for chat conversation, when inserting MCP client and using node server, the request remains in a suspended state for a long time and returns an empty result.
I tried my best to know what happened internally, but no logs were output during the suspension period

**Env**
- jdk17
- java
- deepseek
- maven

﻿
**Copy steps**
visit https://start.spring.io/ Download project template

- Project：Maven
- Spring Boot 3.4.3
- Packaging: jar
- Java 17

﻿
Config pom.xml 

```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
	<parent>
		<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
		<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
		<version>3.4.3</version>
		<relativePath/>
	</parent>
	<groupId>com.test</groupId>
	<artifactId>aidemo</artifactId>
	<version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<name>aidemo</name>
	<description>aidemo</description>
	<url/>
	<licenses>
		<license/>
	</licenses>
	<developers>
		<developer/>
	</developers>
	<scm>
		<connection/>
		<developerConnection/>
		<tag/>
		<url/>
	</scm>
	<properties>
		<java.version>17</java.version>
		<maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
		<maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
		<project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
		<spring-ai.version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</spring-ai.version>
	</properties>
	<dependencyManagement>
		<dependencies>
			<dependency>
				<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
				<artifactId>spring-ai-bom</artifactId>
				<version>${spring-ai.version}</version>
				<type>pom</type>
				<scope>import</scope>
			</dependency>
		</dependencies>
	</dependencyManagement>
	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-ai-mcp-client-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-ai-mcp-server-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-ai-anthropic-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
			<artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
			<version>1.7.36</version>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>ch.qos.logback</groupId>
			<artifactId>logback-classic</artifactId>
			<version>3.2.1</version>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>

	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
				<artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
			</plugin>
		</plugins>
	</build>
	<repositories>
		<repository>
			<name>Central Portal Snapshots</name>
			<id>central-portal-snapshots</id>
			<url>https://central.sonatype.com/repository/maven-snapshots/</url>
			<releases>
				<enabled>false</enabled>
			</releases>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>true</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</repository>
		<repository>
			<id>spring-milestones</id>
			<name>Spring Milestones</name>
			<url>https://repo.spring.io/libs-milestone-local</url>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>false</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</repository>
		<repository>
			<id>spring-snapshots</id>
			<name>Spring Snapshots</name>
			<url>https://repo.spring.io/snapshot</url>
			<releases>
				<enabled>false</enabled>
			</releases>
		</repository>
	</repositories>
</project>
```


application.yml
```
spring:
  application:
    name: aidemo
  profiles:
    active: dev
  ai:
    openai:
      api-key: sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
      base-url: https://api.deepseek.com
      chat:
        options:
          model: deepseek-chat
          maxTokens: 1000
          temperature: 0.7
    mcp:
      client:
        enabled: true
        name: testserver
        version: 1.0.0
        type: SYNC
        request-timeout: 6s
        stdio:
          root-change-notification: true
          servers-configuration: classpath:mcp-servers.json
  logging:
    level:
      org:
        springframework:
          ai:
            chat:
              client:
                advisor: DEBUG

```
mcp-servers.json

```
{
  "testserver":{
    "performance": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": [
        "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\testserver\\build\\index.js"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

chatcontroller
```

@RestController
public class ChatController {
    private final OpenAiChatModel chatModel;
    private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ChatController.class);
    private ChatClient chatClient;
    @Autowired
    public ChatController(OpenAiChatModel chatModel,ChatClient.Builder chatClientBuilder, List<McpSyncClient> 
   mcpSyncClients, ToolCallbackProvider tools) {
        this.chatModel = chatModel; 
        this.chatClient = chatClientBuilder
                .defaultTools(tools.getToolCallbacks())
                .build();
    }

   @GetMapping("/ai/generate")
    public Map generate(@RequestParam(value = "message", defaultValue = "Tell me a joke") String message) {
        try {
            logger.info("chat input:"+ message);
            Advisor customLogger = new SimpleLoggerAdvisor(
                    request -> "Custom request: " + request.userText(),
                    response -> "Custom response: " + response.getResult()
            ,0);
            var result = chatClient.prompt().user(message).advisors(customLogger).call().content();
            logger.info("chat output:"+ result);
            return Map.of("generation", result);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            logger.info("chat error:"+ e.getMessage());
            return Map.of("error", "Failed to generate response: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }
}

@SpringBootApplication(exclude = AnthropicAutoConfiguration.class)
public class AiDemoApplication {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		SpringApplication.run(AiDemoApplication .class, args);
	}
}
```


**Expected behavior**
The chat interface can call the MCP server method normally and return the result
Actually, through debugging, I saw that chat entered a breakpoint:
` var result = chatClient.prompt().user(message).advisors(customLogger).call().content();  `
Afterwards, there was a prolonged suspension.
My MCP server actually requested the interface many times, which proves that the MCP server call was successful, but chat kept hanging

comments.body:
我觉得你可以试试 QwQ-32B这个模型，有可能会得到想要的结果，我试了用deepseek R1 调用 mcp，消耗时间特别久并且得到的结果不是我想要的 。

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/91bbccbe-c0f3-49fe-8418-cd2b4cfe9b11)
上边这个是使用QwQ-32B的结果，这个结果是最新的时间

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/391bb915-1779-46a5-b840-01702ae4ee85)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c2858280-7b84-47eb-af8a-99ff5cd7506d)

上边是deepseek-R1的结果，新闻时间明显是去年的
代码如下

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/67af7f5e-3d32-405b-8054-975f397a5812)

MCP Server 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/46e14e87-3579-4b7b-b8f9-b635083d92cd)

> 我觉得你可以试试 QwQ-32B这个模型，有可能会得到想要的结果，我试了用deepseek R1 调用 mcp，消耗时间特别久并且得到的结果不是我想要的 。
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/91bbccbe-c0f3-49fe-8418-cd2b4cfe9b11) 上边这个是使用QwQ-32B的结果，这个结果是最新的时间
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/391bb915-1779-46a5-b840-01702ae4ee85)
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c2858280-7b84-47eb-af8a-99ff5cd7506d)
> 
> 上边是deepseek-R1的结果，新闻时间明显是去年的 代码如下
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/67af7f5e-3d32-405b-8054-975f397a5812)
> 
> MCP Server
> 
> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/46e14e87-3579-4b7b-b8f9-b635083d92cd)

其实中间我有怀疑过是不是因为deepseek不支持mcp导致的，因为我看到实际调用的json入参并不是deepseek官方文档里所描述的格式，是不是因此触发了某种retry持续在重试
有可能，你试试QwQ-32B这个模型。我使用的硅基流动平台，我记得之前deepseek不支持tool调用。之前调用的时候，也报过不支持的api结果。

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5633de85-aa83-4bbf-8c50-22f03f8973f4)
deepseek的Function Calling 功能不稳定，容易出现空 循环调用

> ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5633de85-aa83-4bbf-8c50-22f03f8973f4) deepseek的Function Calling 功能不稳定，容易出现空 循环调用

这个chat聊天当中，当前java client对模型发送了什么样的真实内容可以输出出来吗？看上面的代码，我已经尽力添加了日志，能看到的交互信息还是有限的

你可以试试debug，实际上我debug看到的是java clinet 会把定义的所有tool 发送给模型，模型根据userMessage选出需要的tool，并按照tool的schema组装参数，模型响应后，client再进行tool的调用


![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/895c6d1c-b066-4149-a83c-3aa45e0323ba)
上边是调用大模型的request包含的tools

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/de81daa1-fd6a-4770-b0a4-66e15709f233)
上图是大模型返回的数据，选择的tool

org.springframework.ai.openai.OpenAiChatModel#internalCall  这里是WebMvc 调用大模型的代码逻辑
I'm confused about how to use MCP without function calling. Does Spring AI only support function calling to MCP right now?

I am not sure if there is a resolution to this timeout issue on our side.  It looks like the issue is also happening with a node based application so that would seem to indicate this is not specific to the openai support in spring ai.

@FFatTiger It is quite common now that there is focus on using MCP with tool calling.  However, MCP has many other functional areas as you can see from the MCP Spec.  For instance [sampling](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/docs/concepts/sampling).   You can find spring ai examples for sampling [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai-examples/tree/main/model-context-protocol/sampling)

Other examples in that repository showcase other features of MCP, though it isn't yet easy to see from a quick look which examples are using which features of MCP.

The MCP Java SDK is not 100% complete with the MCP spec, but it has a great deal of it implemented. 

Closing this issue, if there is a problem with that, please comment.
